summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No GitHub mutations, merges, fixes, PR creation, or closeouts are planned because merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked and instant/low-signal closeout is disabled. One linked security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling; the rest stay open or closed according to their current state.
